nasb.text: I came forth from the Father and have come into the world; I am leaving the world again and going to the Father.”

esv.text: I came from the Father and have come into the world, and now I am leaving the world and going to the Father.”

cnv.text: 我從父那裡來，到了這世界；我又離開這世界，到父那裡去。”

ccb.text: 我从父那里来到这个世界，现在我要离开这个世界回到父那里。”

csbs.text: 我从父而出，来到这世界；又要离开这世界，到父那里去。”
